testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration run() - agent.run
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration run() - agent.run
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration getResponse() - model.request
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration getResponse() - model.request
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration getStreamedResponse() - model.stream
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration getStreamedResponse() - model.stream
testcase.name: should generate span without error when stream errors during iteration

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in tool.invokeFunctionTool() - tool.call
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in tool.invokeFunctionTool() - tool.call
testcase.name: should generate span without error when tool error is non-fatal

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration onInvokeHandoff() - handoff
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration onInvokeHandoff() - handoff
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in runner/guardrails.runInputGuardrails() - guardrail.input
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in runner/guardrails.runInputGuardrails() - guardrail.input
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in runner/guardrails.runOutputGuardrails() - guardrail.output
testcase.name: should generate span with correct tags (happy path)

testcase.classname: Plugin openai-agents with @openai/agents-core >=0.7.0 (0.7.0) without configuration module-level export in runner/guardrails.runOutputGuardrails() - guardrail.output
testcase.name: should generate span with error tags (error path)
